Teaching

List of teaching activities

2024-2025

  • Chargé de TD (exercise sessions) for Advanced Probability course in Sorbonne Université (last year of bachelor).

2021-2022

  • Colleur (Oral examiner in the french "prépa" system) in math for PC* (second year Physics-Chemistry) at Lycée Blaise Pascal Orsay

    2020-2021

  • Colleur in math for MPSI (first year Math-Physics) at Lycée du Parc Lyon

    2019-2020

  • Volunteer colleur in math for MPSI at Lycée Blaise Pascal Orsay during lockdown
  • Volunteer at ENSeigner association (help for highschool students)

External links

Some links to other people who are way better than me at this.

This webpage compiles lots of interesting and useful infos and links for students. In french only.
